properties.query: insert into attendance (village_id, user_id, status, attendance_date) values (?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT a.*, u.name as user_name FROM attendance a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.user_id = ? ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;
SELECT a.*, u.name as user_name FROM attendance a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;
SELECT a.*, u.name as user_name FROM attendance a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.attendance_date = ? ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;
UPDATE attendance SET status = ? WHERE attendance_id = ?
